run_summary.summary: Busy day — three deals had meaningful activity and one new inbound landed. Flexsteel had a big move: after Kenny sent the 3-video concept to Ian this morning, Liz went ahead and submitted Video 1 to Ian via Google Drive link this afternoon (3:21 PM). Moving to Approval, but the Popfly campaign access issue is still unresolved. Linkind SP6 is stuck in revision purgatory — brand sent contradictory feedback (don't want close shot, don't want wide shot), and Liz replied frustrated, asking for a call to sort it out. Yousky is officially dead — Liz gracefully passed after Luna confirmed $250 max vs Liz's $2000 floor. New inbound: Wise Block Botanical Series, paid collab from Make Wonder INC — needs an urgent reply as the launch window closes around Apr 30.

suggestions.message: New paid inbound from Iris at Make Wonder INC (official agency for Wise Block). She's following up from Apr 23 — Botanical Series building set collab, 1x YT/IG video, cash fee + free product. Launch window 'Before April 25–30' is basically closing NOW. If you want this, reply today with a quote — she's clearly interested. Timeline is tight but if Iris is flexible on the launch date it could still work.

Liz is stuck — brand wants footage that's 'not close' AND 'not wide,' which is contradictory. She sent a frustrated email this morning offering to jump on a call. If the platform doesn't respond by tomorrow, worth nudging them for clarification so Liz knows whether to reshoot at all.
Liz officially passed today. Yousky's max is $250, Liz's floor is $2000 — no path forward. She left the door open gracefully ('if budgets change'). Safe to manually archive this card.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Ian on Video 1 review and Popfly campaign access
deals.notes: [Apr 28]: Liz submitted Video 1 to Ian via Google Drive (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1UEZpjEi4tFag-RV_qe4rowbLy-zEOgtc). Kenny also shared full 3-video concept in writing same day: (1) tribute to dad/80th bday + Father's Day — browsing Steinhafels website + Flexsteel chairs; (2) Steinhafels shopping trip + chair testing; (3) reveal/gifting to dad. Popfly campaign still not showing on Liz's dashboard — Kenny asked Ian to reopen or set as invite. Waiting on Ian to confirm Video 1 receipt and sort campaign access.
deals.activity_note: Apr 28: Liz submitted Video 1 to Ian via Drive link — moving to Approval. Popfly campaign access still unresolved (2 more videos pending).

deals.next_action: Follow up if no response to Liz's clarification request — contradictory visual feedback on close/wide shot
deals.notes: [Apr 28]: Brand sent revision requests via socialmediacollabs.com platform. Contradictory feedback: don't want close shot, but don't want wide shot for the lighting effect section. Liz replied frustrated at 11:16 AM — willing to fix items 4 & 5 (add end CTA + caption hashtags/tag brand), but stuck on the visual reshoot direction. Offered to jump on a call for clarity.
deals.activity_note: Apr 28: Brand revision requests received with contradictory visual notes. Liz flagged the conflict and offered a call — waiting on platform/brand to clarify.

deals.next_action: Deal passed Apr 28 — revisit only if Yousky budget increases significantly
deals.notes: [Apr 28]: Liz officially passed. Yousky's max for first collab is $250; Liz's minimum is $2000. Liz told Luna (luna@yousky.com): 'Thank you for confirming that was the best you can do. If budgets change in the future, we would welcome the opportunity to continue the conversation.' Deal is effectively closed — recommend manually archiving this card.
deals.activity_note: Apr 28: Deal passed by Liz — budget gap too wide ($250 max vs $2000 floor). Graceful close, door left open for future.

deals.next_action: Reply to Iris with rate/quote — URGENT, launch deadline Before Apr 25–30
deals.notes: [Apr 28]: Follow-up from Iris at Make Wonder INC (official partner agency for Wise Block, under Alpha Group). Offering paid collaboration for the Botanical Series — 1x YouTube or Instagram Video. Compensation: cash ('Competitive Collaboration Fee,' amount TBD) + free building block set + 'Key Partner' status. Launch deadline: Before April 25–30 (window closing NOW). Sample delivery: 3–5 days after confirmation. Four product designs: Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony. Eastern floral / Zen garden aesthetic building sets — positioned as home décor + self-care. Original outreach Apr 23, this is first follow-up. No response sent yet — ball is in our court.
